mapper.sql: id, title, topic, audience, template_id, request_text, current_stage, current_outline_version_id, page_count_target, style_preset, background_asset_path, cast(workflow_constraints_json as varchar) as workflow_constraints_json, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
select
from projects order by updated_at desc, created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into projects ( id, title, topic, audience, template_id, request_text, current_stage, current_outline_version_id, page_count_target, style_preset, background_asset_path, workflow_constraints_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{id, jdbcType=OTHER}, #{title}, #{topic}, #{audience}, #{templateId}, #{requestText}, #{currentStage}, #{currentOutlineVersionId, jdbcType=OTHER}, #{pageCountTarget}, #{stylePreset}, #{backgroundAssetPath}, cast(#{workflowConstraintsJson, jdbcType=VARCHAR} as jsonb), #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: update projects set title = #{title}, topic = #{topic}, audience = #{audience}, template_id = #{templateId}, request_text = #{requestText}, current_stage = #{currentStage}, current_outline_version_id = #{currentOutlineVersionId, jdbcType=OTHER}, page_count_target = #{pageCountTarget}, style_preset = #{stylePreset}, background_asset_path = #{backgroundAssetPath}, workflow_constraints_json = cast(#{workflowConstraintsJson, jdbcType=VARCHAR} as jsonb), updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.delete: delete from projects where id = #{projectId, jdbcType=OTHER}
